step_rationale: Metabolite associated with acute coronary syndrome; axis between oxidative stress and injury.
mechanism: 5-oxo-D-proline is a circulating metabolite elevated in acute coronary syndrome with plausible links to oxidative stress during acute myocardial injury.

references.title: Plasma Metabolomics of Acute Coronary Syndrome Patients Based on Untargeted Liquid Chromatography-Mass Spectrometry.
